command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix. Compatibility alias for the previous six-artifact matrix URL.

parsed.summary: Static refund escalation review UI focused on choosing the next path and sending a clear handoff.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f4f6f5;color:#202322;font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif}.refund-review{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;gap:18px}.topbar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:24px;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid #d8ddda}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#5e6b66}.topbar h1{margin:0;font-size:28px;line-height:1.1;font-weight:750;color:#171918}.topbar p{margin:8px 0 0;max-width:720px;color:#53615b;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45}.status-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;white-space:nowrap;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #c98a42;background:#fff6e8;color:#7b4a10;padding:7px 11px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.review-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr) 360px;gap:18px;align-items:start}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #dce1de;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(24,32,29,.04);overflow:hidden}.panel-header{padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e8e6;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:center}.panel-header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;line-height:1.25;color:#1c211f}.panel-header .muted{font-size:12px}.queue{padding:10px}.queue-item{width:100%;border:1px solid transparent;background:transparent;text-align:left;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin:0 0 8px;display:grid;gap:6px;color:#202322}.queue-item.active{border-color:#1d765e;background:#eef8f4}.queue-item:hover{background:#f6f8f7}.queue-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:750}.queue-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;color:#596660;font-size:13px}.content-stack{display:grid;gap:18px}.request-body{padding:18px;display:grid;gap:16px}.summary-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px}.detail{border:1px solid #e0e5e2;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:#fbfcfb}.detail span{display:block;color:#66726d;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:4px}.detail strong{font-size:15px;color:#202322}.request-text{margin:0;padding:14px 16px;border-left:4px solid #1d765e;background:#f5faf8;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;color:#29312e;line-height:1.45}.evidence-list{padding:8px 18px 18px;display:grid;gap:10px}.evidence-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:96px 1fr;gap:12px;align-items:start;padding:12px;border:1px solid #e1e6e3;border-radius:8px}.badge{display:inline-flex;width:max-content;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:750}.badge.good{background:#e9f7ef;color:#126b45}.badge.note{background:#edf1f7;color:#405b86}.badge.missing{background:#fff0e3;color:#9b4d11}.evidence-row p{margin:0;line-height:1.4;color:#2b312f}.policy-body{padding:18px}.policy-body p{margin:0;color:#333b38;line-height:1.48}.decision-body{padding:18px;display:grid;gap:16px}.decision-options{display:grid;gap:10px}.decision-option{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:10px;align-items:start;border:1px solid #dfe5e1;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;background:#fff}.decision-option.selected{border-color:#1d765e;background:#f0f8f5}.decision-option input{margin-top:3px;accent-color:#1d765e}.decision-title{display:block;font-weight:750;color:#1f2522;margin-bottom:3px}.decision-copy{display:block;color:#596660;font-size:13px;line-height:1.35}.owner-row{display:grid;gap:6px}.owner-row label,.reason-box label{font-size:13px;font-weight:750;color:#303834}.owner-row select{height:38px;border:1px solid #cfd6d2;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;padding:0 10px;font:inherit;color:#202322}.reason-box{display:grid;gap:6px}.reason-box textarea{width:100%;min-height:104px;resize:none;border:1px solid #cfd6d2;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;font:inherit;line-height:1.4;color:#202322;background:#fff}.handoff-preview{border:1px solid #dfe5e1;border-radius:8px;background:#fafbfa;padding:12px;display:grid;gap:8px}.handoff-preview h3{margin:0;font-size:14px;color:#202322}.handoff-preview p{margin:0;color:#4d5a55;font-size:13px;line-height:1.4}.actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px;padding-top:2px}.primary-button,.secondary-button{height:40px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid transparent;font-weight:750;font-size:14px}.primary-button{background:#1d765e;color:#fff}.secondary-button{background:#fff;color:#23473e;border-color:#b8cbc4}.secondary-button:disabled{color:#8a948f;background:#f2f4f3;border-color:#d8ddda}.muted{color:#68756f}@media(max-width:980px){.refund-review{padding:16px}.review-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.summary-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.topbar{flex-direction:column}.status-chip{align-self:flex-start}}
parsed.html:
Support operations manager

Refund escalation review

Review the selected request, confirm the evidence, choose the next path, and send a handoff with the reason for the decision.

Evidence incomplete

Refund queue

3 open

Selected request

R-1842
CustomerNora Diaz
PlanPro annual
Amount$184.20
Request statusNeeds receipt

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Evidence checklist

1 item missing
Confirmed

Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.

Captured

Support note captures the customer's refund reason.

Missing

Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.

Policy context

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Decision path

Next action

Return the request to the support agent with the missing evidence request.
